name: ua-ovdp-plugin
description: Single-plugin marketplace for ua-ovdp-plugin (Ukrainian OVDP bonds).

plugins.name: ua-ovdp-plugin
plugins.description: Query, analyze, and track Ukrainian government bonds (ОВДП) via ovdp.in.ua, Приват24, and Inzhur — real yields (XIRR), price history, data-quality warnings.
